title: Claude Code Command Frontmatter
description: Schema for validating YAML frontmatter in command .md files

name.description: Command identifier (kebab-case). Optional - if omitted, the filename (minus .md) serves as the command name.

description.description: What this command does and when to use it - shown in command discovery and completion menus
examples: Display all available skills from the Claude Code Development Kit plugin
Migrate a prompt or file into a properly structured Claude Code skill

argument-hint.description: Hint text shown in argument completion, describing what arguments the command accepts

allowed-tools.description: List of tools this command is permitted to use during execution

arguments.description: Declared arguments this command accepts, used for documentation and completion hints

name.description: Argument name (used as placeholder in help text)

required.description: Whether the argument is required for the command to run

type.description: Expected value type for the argument

examples.name: file-path
examples.description: Path to the file to process

user-invocable.description: Whether this command can be directly invoked by the user via a slash command. When false, the command is only available for model-initiated use.

context.description: Set to 'fork' to run this command in a forked sub-agent context.

hooks.description: Hook configurations for this command. Uses the same event names and handler schema as hooks.json.

examples.name: available-skills
examples.description: Display all available skills from the Claude Code Development Kit plugin

examples.name: migrate-to-skill
examples.description: Migrate a prompt or file into a properly structured Claude Code skill
